name: codex-usage-tracker
description: Unofficial local tracker for aggregate Codex token usage from local session logs.

interface.shortDescription: Unofficial local aggregate token usage analytics for Codex
interface.longDescription: Unofficial independent project, not made by, affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or supported by OpenAI. Reads local Codex session logs, aggregates exact token usage counters, and generates summaries, CSV exports, and a hoverable dashboard with optional localhost-only raw context loading.
defaultPrompt: Check my Codex usage tracker setup
Show my Codex token usage summary
Show my most expensive Codex calls
Update Codex usage pricing from OpenAI docs
Generate a threaded Codex usage dashboard
Serve a Codex dashboard with on-demand context
Export my Codex token usage CSV
